'''gabojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enbian|enbian]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-b-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enbian|enbian]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gabojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæbejeth|gæbejeth]] || [[word:gæbejej|gæbejej]] || [[word:gæbejesh|gæbejesh]] || [[word:gæbeje|gæbeje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gabobojoth|gabobojoth]] || [[word:gabobojoj|gabobojoj]] || [[word:gabobojosh|gabobojosh]] || [[word:gabobojo|gabobojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gabojoth|gabojoth]] || [[word:gabojoj|gabojoj]] || [[word:gabojosh|gabojosh]] || [[word:gabojo|gabojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gabofjoth|gabofjoth]] || [[word:gabofjoj|gabofjoj]] || [[word:gabofjosh|gabofjosh]] || [[word:gabofjof|gabofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gabojotho|gabojotho]] || [[word:gabojojo|gabojojo]] || [[word:gabojosho|gabojosho]] || [[word:gabojoko|gabojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gabojoth|gabojoth]] || [[word:gabojoj|gabojoj]] || [[word:gabojosh|gabojosh]] || [[word:gabojo|gabojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gabojothol|gabojothol]] || [[word:gabojojol|gabojojol]] || [[word:gabojoshol|gabojoshol]] || [[word:gabojokol|gabojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gabojothotho|gabojothotho]] || [[word:gabojojojo|gabojojojo]] || [[word:gabojoshosho|gabojoshosho]] || [[word:gabojoko|gabojoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gabojothon|gabojothon]] || [[word:gabojojon|gabojojon]] || [[word:gabojoshon|gabojoshon]] || [[word:gabojokon|gabojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gabojothoro|gabojothoro]] || [[word:gabojojoro|gabojojoro]] || [[word:gabojoshoro|gabojoshoro]] || [[word:gabojokoro|gabojokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
